chat.title: Community chat
chat.loginToSend: Sign in with Discord to join the chat.

errors.linkBlocked: Links are not allowed in chat.
errors.excessiveCaps: Please don't shout — too many capital letters.
errors.duplicate: You just sent that — please wait before repeating it.
errors.rateLimited: Slow mode: one message every 30 seconds.
errors.timedOut: You are muted for another {minutes} min.
